decision.title: Choose AIRCA MVP
decision.question: What should AIRCA ship first for public adoption?
decision.context: The project needs a useful first release that people can understand and try quickly.
decision.rationale: Schema + CLI creates the fastest path to usability, demos, and GitHub-native adoption.

options.name: Schema + CLI
options.description: Ship a schema, CLI, and example artifacts first.

options.name: Full orchestration engine
options.description: Build a larger workflow engine before examples and packaging.
